title: NoPlugins+
description: Lightweight, powerful plugin-hiding solution with smooth, secure, and lag-free protection рЯФТ
body:
# **NoPlugins+**
> **This config provides:** вЪЩпЄП

- рЯФТ Full plugin hiding

- рЯЫ°пЄП Strong command protection

- рЯО≠ Fake realistic responses

- вЪЩпЄП Advanced control over tab & commands

- рЯСС Flexible permission system

> **Dependencie** рЯУГ

- No dependencies required 

> **Support** рЯТђ

- Need help or support? Join our Discord вЮЯ [Click Here](https://discord.gg/QY6wsN64w3)

 # рЯІ© **1. All Features**

рЯФР **Plugin & Command Protection**

**Blocks sensitive commands like:**

```/plugins, /pl, /version, /about, /help```

- Prevents players from discovering server plugins

- Replaces real output with fake/custom messages

---

рЯО≠ **Fake Plugin Message System**

- Shows custom message:

```Plugins (3): Not, Your, Business```

- Can be changed per command

- Supports multi-line messages

---

вЪЩпЄП **Command Tab Control**

- ```clear-command-list:``` Removes all commands from tab

- ```clean-command-list:``` Removes plugin prefixes like ```essentials:```

- Keeps tab completion clean and secure

---

рЯЫ°пЄП **Operator Bypass Control**

```operator-bypass: false```

- Even OP players **cannot bypass** unless they have permission:

```noplugin.bypass```

---

рЯЪЂ **Console-Only Commands**

- Blocks commands for players:

```/op, /deop, /stop```

- Only usable from console

---

рЯФН **String Command Protection**

- Blocks hidden commands like:

```/spigot, /essentials, /pex```

- Sends custom message if used

---

рЯУ¶ **Plugin Command Blocking**

- Hide all commands from specific plugins:
- LuckPerms
- WorldGuard

---

вЭМ **Command Blocking System**

- Shows message:

```Unknown command. Type "/help" for help.```

- Makes blocked commands look natural

---

рЯТђ **Custom Messaging System**

- Per-command custom messages
- Multi-line support
- Color codes supported (```&a```,```&c```, etc.)

## вМ®пЄП **2. All Commands Used (Player Side)**

These commands are **blocked or modified:**

рЯЪЂ **Blocked Commands**

```
/plugins
/pl
/version
/ver
/about
/?
/icanhasbukkit
/bukkit:plugins
/bukkit:pl
/bukkit:version
/bukkit:ver
/bukkit:about
/bukkit:?
/bukkit:help
```


рЯФТ **Optional Blocked (String Commands)**

```
/spigot
/essentials
/pex

```

вЪ†пЄП **Console Only Commands**

```
/op
/deop
/stop
```


## рЯФС 3. **All Permissions**


рЯЫ°пЄП **Main Permission**

```noplugin.bypass```

**Allows player to bypass all restrictions**

**Required if:**


```
operator-bypass: false
```
---

рЯСС **OP Behavior**

If ```operator-bypass: false```

OP **CANNOT bypass automatically**

If ```operator-bypass: true```

OP **can bypass without permission**
